name: Pink

name: Carmine

description: A soft pinkish-orange, the color of peach flesh.

name: Marigold
description: The bright yellow of the marigold, a member of the chrysanthemum family native to Mexico.

description: The warm yellow of the metal gold.

description: The yellow of the metal gold.

name: Buff
description: A light yellow-brown, the color of buffalo leather.

name: Maize
description: The yellow of kernels of ripe maize (corn).
